what_page_provides: National Environment Canada weather portal with warnings, forecast navigation, radar/lightning entry points, and SSR-inlined weather state.
likely_endpoint_families: SSR inline state embedded in the page for alerts, city, and map state.
Warnings HTML document family under /warnings/, including weather summaries.
Vue SSR bundles that reference lightning, radar, alert, and AQHI state handling.
likely_layer_families: Lightning family referenced in bundle strings as Lightning/1/ and Lightning/metadata/1.
Radar family referenced in bundle strings, including radar composites and coverage metadata.
Map state in SSR output suggests route-driven weather web mapping rather than a standalone JSON API.
auth_notes: Public site. No auth barrier observed. Main page is SSR HTML plus Vue bundles.

endpoints.notes: Main Vue SSR bundle for the weather portal.
Bundle contains lightning/radar strings and alert-related route handling.
Warning summary document family referenced by bundle/page state.

Relative lightning metadata family string found in the bundle; host/path resolution remains uncertain from page-only recon.
Relative radar family string found in the bundle.
